falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price breaks above $150,000 (BTC equivalent) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal by indicating strong upward momentum contrary to the pattern's implied bearish bias.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would contradict the blowoff score's implication of contained pressure, suggesting a fundamental shift in market dynamics.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Fed announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a policy intervention would directly counteract the blowoff pressure assumptions, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict by introducing a major stabilizing force.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
